name: Residential Movers
label: Local movers
description: Local residential moving quotes — Rock Hill / Charlotte corridor style local moves.

questions.prompt: What type of move is this?
When do you need to move?
Heavy items, piano, storage, or special constraints?

job_kind.description: Canonical job kind for benchmark lookup, e.g. local_2br_30mi

vendors.name: Carolina Haul Co
vendors.nature: The careful one — careful crews, won't undercut quality just to win.
vendors.public_blurb: Full-service local movers — experienced crews, careful handling, premium insured moves.
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Opens high on labor+truck for 2BR local. Concedes when a real competing written bid is cited; protects floor near mid-benchmark.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI. Human/docs and counter-agent prompt isolation only.

vendors.name: MetroMove Pros
vendors.nature: The cautious one — wants a survey before locking a price.
vendors.public_blurb: Regional moving company — in-home survey preferred before binding quotes.
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Refuses firm phone quotes. Pushes virtual/on-site survey. Session ends documented_decline with callback logged.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI. Human/docs and counter-agent prompt isolation only.

vendors.name: BudgetBox Moving
vendors.nature: The bargain front — low sticker price; stairs and packing fees can stack up.
vendors.public_blurb: Affordable local moves — low sticker rates and same-week availability.
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Lowballs base move then layers packing materials, stair fees, long-carry, and fuel surcharges as itemized add-ons. Total may red-flag vs benchmark.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI. Human/docs and counter-agent prompt isolation only.

local_2br_30mi.label: Local 2BR move ~30 miles (labor + truck, no full pack)
local_2br_30mi.source: Challenge brief: Rock Hill→Charlotte 45mi quotes $1,158–$6,506; FMCSA ~40% sight-unseen overrun; 30%-below-market bait rule; 8,000+ annual FMCSA complaints; hostage-load 31% of filings (up 189% since 2022); 16,851 US movers avg 6.2 employees (moveBuddha/FMCSA/BBB)

spread_low.source: Challenge brief / real quotes Rock Hill→Charlotte

spread_high.source: Challenge brief / real quotes Rock Hill→Charlotte

local_3br_30mi.label: Local 3BR move ~30 miles
local_3br_30mi.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

hourly_2_movers_truck.label: 2 movers + truck (hourly)
hourly_2_movers_truck.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

packing_materials.label: Packing materials (boxes/tape for 2BR)
packing_materials.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

stair_fee.label: Stair / long-carry fee
stair_fee.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

fuel_surcharge.label: Fuel / mileage surcharge
fuel_surcharge.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

full_pack_2br.label: Full packing service 2BR
full_pack_2br.source: Hack-Nation Challenge 01 brief / FMCSA / moveBuddha / BBB (2026)

red_flag.description: Quotes ≥30% below benchmark midpoint are warned, never ranked first as winner.

negotiation_levers: Require full itemization of labor hours, truck, packing, stairs, and fuel
Cite only real competing written bids from get_competing_bids (never invent)
Push back on vague surcharges until line items are clear
Disclose AI/assistant role honestly if asked whether you are a robot
Close every call with a structured outcome: itemized_quote | callback_commitment | documented_decline

glossary.long_carry: Distance from truck to door beyond standard; often billed as a fee.
glossary.binding_estimate: Not-to-exceed style quote when inventory is fixed.
glossary.non_binding: Estimate that can change after on-site survey or inventory.
glossary.cube_sheet: Inventory volume estimate used for pricing.
glossary.COI: Certificate of Insurance often required for apartments.

demo_defaults.notes: Rock Hill → Charlotte ~25–30 mi; second-floor walk-up origin; no piano; need truck + 2 movers.
